name: Audacity
additional_info: Applies true stun to nearby enemies when you start a manual execution on a humanoid target. 25 second cooldown. The buff duration will be reduced by 0.1 seconds for every point of Charisma and Strength you are below Audacity's requirements, capping at a minimum 35 second duration with 75 Charisma and 25 Strength.
desc: Once you've brought down your prey, instill fear into all those who would separate you from claiming it. Charmed or nearby enemies will fear for longer. Nearby allies gain a 10% damage buff (40s).
